---
title: "CG3CG3"
author: 
- de Pedro, Joenell Conrad
- Florentino, Ian Miguel
- Nacu, Drixyl Reece
- Ruelan, Ivan Paul
- Seno, Matthew Anakin
date: "CG3CG3"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(arules)
library
```


```{r}
data <- read_excel("./OnlineRetail.xlsx")
```
